_meta.name: Wolof
_meta.note: Partial seed — covers the highest-visibility keys (nav, header, footer, theme, events, auth). Long-tail translations (profile, newsletter, feed, messages) fall back to French.

hero.srTitle: Xam xew-xew yi ci Senegaal — konferans, konseer, atelye ak festival
hero.subtitle: Konferans, konseer, atelye ak mbooloo ci Senegaal gépp. Xamal lu am ci jamono ji ci Dakar, Cees, Saly ak yeneen.

featured.title: Ñetti xew-xew yu nu dul yombal
featured.subtitle: Ñi nu tànn ci Teranga, ci xew-xew yi gën a neex ci Noor 2026 ci Dakar ak Petite Côte.

browse.title: Saytu jamono ji
browse.subtitle: Tànnal ci kategoori, dëkk, wala budget.

one.title: Bind ci 45 saãu
one.description: Benn nimero, benn billet. Wave ak Orange Money ñu nangu ko; man nga fay ci bës bi ci beneen xew-xew.

two.title: Badge QR bu dul laaj rezo
two.description: Sa billet bi am na bu yaa doon ci rezo. Baax ci dugg, baax ci àll bi.

three.title: Fàttali ci WhatsApp
three.description: Benn mesaas 24h bi jiitu, benn beneen H-1. Lenn lu ëpp, lenn lu wàññi.

simpleReg.title: Bind bu yomb
simpleReg.description: Tann sa billet te bindal sa tur ci ay saañu.

qrBadge.title: Badge QR bu kaaraange
qrBadge.description: Sa badge dijital ak kood QR ngir gaaw dugg.

community.title: Mbooloo
community.description: Bokkul ci mbooloo xew-xew yu Senegaal ak Afrig Sowu.

howItWorks.heading: Ñetti étap, benn badge
howItWorks.subheading: Ca klik ba buntu bi : ñu defar ko ngir dara du teg ci diggante yaw ak xew-xew bi.

step3.title: Bokk

TIMEOUT.description: Ñaan bi jeex na. Xoolal sa koñeksoŋ te jéémaat.

INTERNAL_ERROR.description: Dafa am njuumte ci suñu wàll. Équipe bi xam na. Jéémaatal léegi.

UNAUTHORIZED.description: Dangay war a dugg ngir man a def jëf ji.

FORBIDDEN.description: Amoo sañ-sañ bi ngir def jëf ji.

VALIDATION_ERROR.title: Data yi baaxul
VALIDATION_ERROR.description: Xoolaatal li ngay bind ci formulaire bi.

CONFLICT.description: Jëf bi jàppoo ak li fi nekk. Rafraîchis pàccu bi te jéémaat.

duplicate_registration.title: Bind nga ba noppi
duplicate_registration.description: Am nga bindu ngir xew-xew bi. Wone sa badge ci « Sama bindu yi ».

RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED.description: Yendoo nga ci jéemaat. Xaar tuuti te jéémaat.

REGISTRATION_CLOSED.description: Bindu ubbiwul ba tay ci xew-xew bi.

event_not_published.description: Ki yor xew-xew bi day waajal ba tay.

event_cancelled.description: Ki yor xew-xew bi da ko wacce.

EVENT_FULL.description: Seat yépp jotoon nañu ko. Xoolal yeneen xew-xew walla dellu ci ay waxtu.

ZONE_FULL.title: Zoon bi fees na
ZONE_FULL.description: Zoon bi fees na. Jëm ci beneen zoon bi nekk ci sa badge.

EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED.title: Dagal sa imeyl
EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED.description: Bësal lien bi nu la yónne ngir ubbi bindu yu am fay.

ORGANIZATION_PLAN_LIMIT.title: Xayma bu plan bi jotoon na
ORGANIZATION_PLAN_LIMIT.description: Jëf bi jële na ci xayma yi sa plan di am. Takkal sa plan ngir man a jal.

QR_INVALID.title: QR bi baaxul
QR_INVALID.description: QR code bi xamuñu ko. Xoolal lu ñu nga scan.

QR_NOT_YET_VALID.description: Jéémaatal su waxtu xew-xew bi agsee.
